children.characters: Replacement of the main transformer unit in Block B of the Power Plant Smelter. The existing unit has exceeded its 15-year operational life and recent inspections indicate insulation degradation posing a safety and production risk. Delay beyond April 2025 will result in mandatory shutdown of Furnace Line 2, directly impacting ₹12 Cr per month of production output. Three competitive quotes have been obtained.
Submitted by Rohit Bhatia on 22 Mar 2025 10:22 IST → ACT Validation started 10:22 IST → Validation completed 10:24 IST → Routed to approval queue.
single-approval threshold. Dual sign-off mandatory (Dept Head + Finance Controller).

children.characters: available in CC-2018 — Smelter Unit Opex. Request of ₹78,50,000 is within limits.
Conditional Approval — Route to Finance Controller for dual sign-off due to policy violation (single-approval limit breach). Vendor risk noted but not blocking.

Reasoning: Budget is available and the business case is well-justified with supporting evidence. The policy violation is procedural (amount threshold), not a financial risk indicator. Vendor risk is moderate and should be flagged in the PO. Recommend approval with conditions: (1) dual sign-off, (2) vendor SLA clause in contract.
